texto: We live in a cruel world, Isabel," he says, without looking at me. "I am only a man, and will not always live up to your expectations. And to me, that is a painful reality. But we must never be cruel to one another. Let there be peace between us.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Sylvia Bambola sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “We live in a cruel world, Isabel," he says, without looking at me. "I am only a man, and will not…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, cruelty, paz, útil em momentos de paz.

frase_original: We live in a cruel world, Isabel," he says, without looking at me. "I am only a man, and will not always live up to your expectations. And to me, that is a painful reality. But we must never be cruel to one another. Let there be peace between us.
